title: Curaleaf Opens 63rd Medical Dispensary in Florida
text: Curaleaf opened its 63rd medical dispensary in Florida in August 2024, bringing its total retail footprint to 149 nationwide. The Pensacola location represents continued strategic expansion in Florida, one of Curaleaf's most important markets. Florida has become Curaleaf's largest state market with significant density in major metropolitan areas. The company has been strategically focused on Florida expansion given the state's size, regulatory stability, and strong patient base. By October 2024, Curaleaf had further expanded to 66 locations in Florida, demonstrating the pace of retail expansion. These retail expansions support the company's goal of maintaining market share in key states and positioning itself to capitalize on potential regulatory improvements. The company has balanced retail expansion with profitability, being selective in its market entry strategy.
